# Attribution as Weak Evidence Model

## Purpose

Use platform attribution without confusing it for causality.

## Platform attribution says

```text
The platform claims credit for conversions under its attribution window.
```

## It does not prove

```text
The conversion would not have happened without the ad.
```

## Evidence ladder

| Evidence | Strength |
|---|---|
| Click-through attribution | weak |
| View-through attribution | weaker |
| A/B test | strong |
| Conversion lift / holdout | stronger |
| Geo lift | strong if designed well |
| MMM calibrated by experiments | useful strategic evidence |
| Repeated profit signal plus causal checks | strongest practical evidence |

## Agent rule

Use attribution to operate. Use incrementality to believe.
